description_long: This object is a small, single-propeller airplane with a classic low-wing configuration and a streamlined fuselage. The exterior features a combination of solid black and metallic silver finishes, with visible panel lines and a red nose cone. The cockpit is positioned near the front of the fuselage and appears to be enclosed, likely accommodating a single pilot. The tail section includes a conventional vertical stabilizer and horizontal stabilizers, forming a standard tail design. The landing gear is not fully visible, but the structure suggests a taildragger configuration with main wheels under the wings and a smaller wheel at the tail. The overall design is reminiscent of vintage or training aircraft, with clear structural details and a robust, metallic build.
description: A small, low-wing, single-propeller airplane with a black and silver exterior, red nose, and a conventional tail. The cockpit is enclosed and positioned forward, with detailed paneling and classic design features.
description_view_0: Front view showing the propeller, red nose cone, and symmetrical low wings with visible landing gear outlines.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the streamlined fuselage, enclosed cockpit, and detailed tail structure with visible internal framework.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the tail assembly, horizontal and vertical stabilizers, and the back of the wings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the cockpit canopy, propeller, and the detailed side paneling of the fuselage.
attribute_wingspan_configuration: Low-wing configuration with straight wings and no visible winglets or pronounced dihedral/anhedral angles.
attribute_engine_type: Single nose-mounted piston engine with a two-blade propeller.
attribute_tail_design: Conventional tail with a single vertical stabilizer and two horizontal stabilizers.
attribute_landing_gear_type: Taildragger configuration with two main wheels under the wings and a small tail wheel.
attribute_cockpit_placement: Forward-mounted, enclosed single-seat cockpit with a clear canopy.
